Document:
# Alchemist
The Alchemist is one of the available in-game roles focused on brewing potions and magical essences. This is a lucrative and intellectually demanding job that rewards experimentation and knowledge of magical components.
An Alchemist always has access to one of the [color=#a4885c]Alchemy Laboratories[/color] in the city, where you can craft powerful potions to sell for profit or use to enhance your own abilities.
## Ways to Make Money
- [textlink="Alchemy" link="OE14_EN_Alchemy"] — master potion brewing to create valuable solutions - Sell rare essences to adventurers and mages - Craft dyes and colored solutions for crafters and decorators - Discover new recipes to unlock premium markets
## Key Concepts
An Alchemist benefits from understanding: - [textlink="Crafting" link="OE14Crafting"] — create specialized containers and tools - [textlink="Magic" link="OE14Magic"] — understand essence types and magical properties - [textlink="Economy" link="OE14Economy"] — negotiate prices and manage profit margins
## Requirements
[bold]2 hours[/bold] in the Artisan department. The [bold]ManaWasting[/bold] trait disqualifies you from this role.
